hbd75fd18g8b32g4500g8653g4aed1194924d: At ease, friend. The gnolls hit us hard, but this place is still safe. It's under Tyr's protection.
h7c156839g6a9fg42fagb75ag434f4de8aa08: Defeating a pack of gnolls is no mean feat.
ha22e94beg6c7fg41a4gbdeegf2ae830f2c53: Save your praise - the fight was a disaster. We lost two men to the gnolls, and they weren't even our target.
h076cef4bg99e2g44f5g9222g65ad6ce71428: In truth, we could use some help. Our mission is holy, but we need to rest.
hc9a3f2a5gb043g4be1g98abg7879aec339c6: I'm listening. What do you need?
h44f88bbdg2fdag43e6gbe48g8d92d9855077: We're paladins of Tyr, sworn to protect those in need. He sent us here to hunt a devil.
ha1a4c49cga60eg451fg865eg87bd00da2ee4: Kill the fiend for us, and we'll reward you well.
h301c308eg206dg4fdegb951g224a6812a4b1: If it's holy business, surely you should handle it yourselves?
hc7074f54gd249g4369g81a5g87c439125701: I wish we could, but we've been hunting for more than a tenday without rest.
h30f95729gc3c3g4061g95cbg932f91018b65: It doesn't matter who strikes the killing blow, as long as justice is done.
h11151e76g0476g43f9ga86ageb6f0af8453e: Fiends come in all forms. What am I looking for?
h5056dbc8gb177g4eb9g8d33g651989e75e6a: She has the form of a tiefling, with a single horn, but she's an infernal being, straight out of the Nine Hells.
h0c9fe857g9d5eg464aga320gebce90a56f3b: *You recognise the description - the wounded tiefling you met by the river.*
h3376a21eg15bbg448cgae75g940ec383a0fc: She's slaughtered countless refugees. Yesterday, she butchered an entire family... the mother had been pregnant.
h6414e5eeg2d25g4ae2ga426gff7696be2f7e: *It could be the work of a devil, but they mostly collect souls through cunning rather than carnage.*
hc1f5b36dg4097g42e0gafd3gd56933ebd453: I know the woman you seek. She's under my protection.
h93d176c4g0d08g4f36gaa2agd6f3ba594d84: I don't know what she told you, but you've picked the wrong side. She'll join you in the Hells when we find her!
hc5cde1eag4597g4746ga3a9gb15e75ae80d1: Truly? I believe I've met her.
hd9c04c1bg599bg4628ga9ddgbdb020cae446: Then you're lucky to be alive. If you see her again, bring me her head.
h04cd5ebagcfc6g4ee4g96cdgafa81b40fda9: I've already dealt with her. She's dead.
hb9d9a3edg1ceag42degb1d7g5986461006c5: If that's true, this is the first glimmer of hope we've had for a long while. But I'll need proof.
hddc8e620g8efag47adgb84cgc73990c0e8f5: Bring me her head, and I'll give you my blade. It carries Tyr's blessing - and you will have earned it by carrying out His justice.
h0de899a7g19cdg4261gb0f7g9bce7e9ec162: Where was the last place you saw her?
hff13489cg90f8g4620g8dabg97136e931c37: She led the gnolls we fought last night, so she can't be far from here.
h1b97c660g9af4g41f3ga940g1f28c2a4a568: This is the Sword of Justice, blessed by Tyr. I've wielded it since I swore my oath.
h9311ad4cga12ag4974gaf47ge13bf51edd80: It's all I have, but it's yours if you bring me her head. This monster must be stopped.
h41aec65bg3858g45ccg983bg525f87c3e42b: I understand. But if you see the fiend, be on your guard. She's dangerous.
h4a484f78g80b4g4cd5g8659g54731e5600a0: I've been called a devil before. Are you sure about this?
h1bfcd30egcb02g4240g9909gb1ecf1f86579: The fiend may have been a tiefling once, but she belongs to Avernus now.
h554a4e7ag9a58g4309g82b3gb883eb31f525: *You recognise the description - the wounded tiefling you killed by the river.*
hc38bb81bg982bg4b7fgbbfag2f4724fdbe82: It'd be easier to take your belongings after I kill you.
hd1a02753gbbdag4d85gb8a7ga3f6f7ce085c: You damned fool. It didn't have to be like this.
h7c687178gf553g4cdegb9cdg9039baee84b6: That's not the sort of work I do.
h3e5995a2gdd83g455eg8047g24dd66b99bce: I understand. Not many could. But if you see a tiefling with a single horn - be on your guard. She's dangerous.
h9e00f925g47fcg4e9aga6b3g091429f2699e: I think I'll help myself to your belongings.
h4d524649g8f68g4c14gb39bg3f45b711f1a7: I don't need anyone's protection - I can fend for myself.
h4b8a9341g614fg4ebegb07ag43cafbe8349a: Good. Do you have courage to go with that confidence? Because we could use the help of brave souls.
hd1ba0382g9b6fg408bga186g07ecd5220724: Courage and then some. What's going on?
h49dac1c9g061eg424egaea1g1b07e8538087: I'm brave enough to help myself to your belongings.
hf5253eaag4086g418ag9c5bgdafac19b7141: Fool. All you'll get is a broken skull.
hde75e21age239g4364ga495g2e1c6fbc81fe: Yes. Paladins in his service, sworn to bring justice to those who need it.
hef3b935cg53afg4c9cgb6d2g176411a46ace: But there are many in need, and few of us. This was our third battle in as many days. In truth, we could use some help.
hc0f2f200g9982g4c3dg84e8g5e91b0e93192: Help I can offer. What's going on?
h6fbc9a21g31e6g41dbg805egc1104a508487: A devil is terrorising the refugees on these roads. Tyr sent us to hunt her.
h1449dbf4ge76dg492eg8baeg55964bae8ce3: You'll have to find it elsewhere.
h9f0bda82ge38cg4c3ega3e0gf96da11ff4f4: The gnolls softened you up. I'll finish you off.
h26e6a558gbfd9g46e8g95edg56c7f26ab21f: Truth and justice, brother. My oath is in Tyr's name.
he52eab8eg45d2g413cg81e6g31022aa02e8c: A fellow paladin? What fortune. There are wrongs to right, and we need help.
hd63b6af8gc24bg4a69g94e0g92625c27ca20: I'd be glad to help. What do you need?
hf8131869g682eg4eb1g96e7g9428e99829aa: The Lord sent us here to hunt a devil.
hd6120402g6f1dg402aga41dgbb832c3eda8b: I have my own business to attend to.
h77ab5e24g3daag47a4ga2f3g940cefc7c251: I understand. But be warned - there is a devil terrorising those who travel these roads. We were sent to kill her.
h84eae39ag8c73g48f9ga344g87a1319103db: Quite the task. Tell me more.
h140ad33egefbdg4364g9c38g7d5c10731ebd: *You see the image of a shattered scale in your mind - a sign from Tyr. This man is a liar.*
h46a0ccd9ga1b5g4e25ga0dbg4a8c32a107d4: Drop the charade - you don't serve Tyr. Who are you really?
hb2930db4gaf7cg4a9bgbf1cg6a077276960a: Bless you. I'm a cleric in Tyr's church.
h49292e89gcbd2g4aedgbcebg9fb0b615f7a3: What fortune. Tyr himself must have sent you to assist us. We are paladins in his service.
h00b13d69ge7f4g4d6bg924cgaf39cbfe8570: Your actions saved many souls - Tyr be with you.
hb9777151g5be7g4b91gbc73gac0564168c1e: The devil's still out there. Any sign of it?
h0c020a88g5fc6g4b1dg8db4g19accacd6391: Any sign of the tiefling fiend?
hcfd844e6gec12g42c2g95cfg954764c01e19: Here's her head. Just like you asked.
h031db8e2g7e4dg42aegad8ag23b9a31f4dd6: You've saved our souls. It's a debt that can never truly be repaid.
hf47b2685gd70eg426ag91c4g58e8ae6579a0: But here is my blade, blessed by Tyr. I hope it keeps you safe, and brings your enemies to justice.
h1c562e04g5cfeg4f4fg8e02g7866fa04704e: Thank you. As promised, here is my blade, blessed by Tyr.
h79cd0327g3779g4e3bgb120g81b1eed40b7f: It's sacred... the most valuable thing I've ever held. I hope it serves you as well as it served me.
h718f2e96gcfb6g4329ga2feg9541c9de7970: A grim business - but justice has been served. May Tyr watch over you.
h315e5592g3564g44f7g95e4g5a0e8919bcaf: Remind me - how will I recognise her?
h6525c776geaf8g4835gaa63g2d92bdfabb5e: She only has one horn, and she looks like she could rip your arms off with her bare hands. Hard to miss.
h657b011fge006g4028gbec6g4ca4a9b1e0db: I met her. She says you're the fiends, and I believe her.
h4663ae0eg5881g4d0cga615g172d2c074d21: You'd damn all of us to save her rotten soul? Curse you!
hac2cee23g6318g44aegb456g7566b7c1f2d0: I met her by the river, not far from here.
hadacae48g6492g4626g8fbeg6f29da946165: But she's still alive? We need her head.
h73d8e1a2gbb6eg4e99g8c68g07f196a655d2: Drop the act - you're no paladin. You serve the archdevil Zariel.
h1d63d4b2g11dcg4985gb024ga6cbb1cc510c: I'm sorry we deceived you. I did follow Tyr once, but I broke my oath when I saw how blind his justice can be
h3823a1f8g58ceg48c8g9863ge7d7976a57e5: Goblins slaughtered my children while I was fighting other people's battles. Was that justice?
hff04bf01g5b6dg4e8dgbc49g9b902be77ce5: You have blasphemed against the Even-Handed!
ha032fabfg13d6g4688ga991gc866e30401e2: You're as blind as your god.
ha56a0ad9gf5c2g49c0ga522gcac63e1a21c0: In the greater view of things? Perhaps it was.
h8b4379d2g4120g4637ga44ag89ff07bf3455: It was a twisted kind of justice then.
h5d7f3437g8e2fg4530gb009gd533e6907e08: I serve a simpler master now - the archdevil Zariel. She gives me the power to protect those I love, and the price I must pay is clear.
h2216bb70g028bg4e70gaf9dgd3249297c873: You betrayed my god for a devil. Fall to justice by my hand!
h011ba60egf045g4d16g9abfgee0bd22963c2: It doesn't seem like justice. I'm sorry you suffered.
hd474cb12g487dg42e0gbe5cgc88f9ef9a27c: I'm sorry we deceived you. I was a paladin of Tyr, but I broke my oath. May I ask - who do you serve?
hb54fa437gfea7g4829g844eg40391cc32543: Why did you break your oath?
h6f2ae73fgfb6ag4fddga687gb26f833694e7: My friends and companions. I'd sacrifice a great deal for them.
hab87ebfag4e0eg4068g9aaegc5215dde72f4: Nobody but myself. I'm just trying to survive.
h4ffa8dd1g7332g4745g9a5cg82b2d9a6beb6: I have a pact of my own.
h8c7c6373gcbc0g44deg9b6fg8670b1aba687: Wise. The power of gods and kings is fading - they can't protect us.
h0af10242g3405g46d2g862fg695809c02333: Unlike you, I truly serve justice.
hcc83854bg6ae1g4c32g99cdg4f15f5074d09: One day, you'll learn that there is no justice - only survival.
hb53cc1beg88e4g497fg8fa1g6eb256017395: When I lost my home... my family... Tyr didn't help. It was Zariel who gave me hope and a reason to go on living.
he908924dg4b0eg46c8g8ea4g53dab00d9ec5: A queen? Safe in her palace, no doubt, while the world burns.
h970fb276g58e6g4d3fgbe2fg74e26eb0bf88: The world falls into chaos, and the gods do nothing. Do you not think I prayed to Tyr? Begged him?
h20e50e22g75c8g444dg84b4g5d55804f3de6: I serve Zariel, just as you do.
hb49da1afg01edg4542gbb4fg8a69d9453b4e: She saved you too? Share in the power she gave me.
h05945309g7b96g4330g9615g20bef40df143: I refused her first messenger - I was sworn to Tyr, and trusted him to watch over me. He didn't.
h6c160a51ge2d7g46a0ga1e1gb69f79a458dd: By the time the second messenger came, I'd lost my home... my children. Everything. If I'd listened, they'd still be alive.
hd67970b2g1f0bg4b89g99d6g84065ca188f9: Now, I have the power to save others... and myself. But there's a price to pay.
h02f7ca85g63edg451fgbbebg6d30a41eb4aa: Of course there is. What do you owe Zariel?
hf5909823g8f7ag4135ga7d7g117fb5ffadff: A soul. Either my own, or that of the tiefling devil we're hunting.
h9d0904a6g24afg4b14g97afge21a0925fb84: I'll hunt her down for you. What do I get in return?
h418b652bgc15fg43e3gbe58g0770859a46b5: If you do we'll reward you well. This is the Sword of Justice, blessed by Tyr. I've wielded it since I swore my oath.
h1e986872g225cg460cgb116ga802bc27aee6: I may have broken that oath, but the blade retains its power.
h954db63ag6019g48fegaefcg6f6ca237158e: It's all that remains of my past. And it'll be yours if you bring me her head.
h48cd8fe2gc70eg4904g8559gea5ba34eb7f4: You'd damn another soul to save your own?
h266ec070g7984g4d5bg8075g797b40bd9d0f: Her soul's already damned. She escaped from the Hells - we just need to send her back.
h973d6ddag4e19g4d12gba8eg2e4b77686ef6: I'm done with this. You're on your own.
hfe1abd10gb678g413fg9476g914fb756c657: You betrayed Tyr. Your soul is worthless.
h501ade73gab7bg4627g8977gfef40d20543c: A soul. Either my own, or that of a creature bound to her that escaped Avernus.
h648288eegb206g4002gab9eg2def39e84734: I've already dealt with her - she's dead.
h5b2be3fdg49ebg41a0gb150g8f0da10274b2: Truly? Then you may have saved our souls - but you need to bring us proof.
h398617fbg29b8g4597ga308g8c229a0376cb: There's always a price. You were a fool to sign the pact.
h6fcebc6egc455g47a8ga370gbe55daf14595: Without the pact, I'd be dead. We all would.
hc2207495g22b8g40e7g9f5fg1128c7c4701e: What powers did Zariel grant you?
hf7541279g3c5cg4635gbfadg220940744a03: Strength enough to slaughter those beasts outside. And almost anything else that gets in our way.
h8886f3e8ga3d3g4a13gbba3g7de11f957638: Liar. But you will serve her soon... in the Hells.
h9407a437g5a73g423bga02cg77d641060851: Any sign of the tiefling fiend?
